rows.label: qev075303_MSG0001
rows.name:
Oh! You beat them all!
That was some pretty splendid skill![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075303_MSG0002
rows.name:
...Well, since it was after I beat them to a pulp
with my Zang Crush, you probably just had to deliver the finishing blow![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075303_JNK0010
rows.name: Object

rows.label: qev075303_SEL0011
rows.name: State the fact that they were not weakened at all.

rows.label: qev075303_JNK0020
rows.name: Query

rows.label: qev075303_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask about his relationship with Zang.

rows.label: qev075303_MSG0003
rows.name:
Guh... You're a pretty harsh Earthling.
It's true that this time my hit might have landed poorly...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075303_MSG0004
rows.name:
...But someday, I'll definitely become a strong Bias
who can beat them to a pulp![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075303_MSG0005
rows.name:
To do that, I need to have Master quickly teach me
some incredibly strong ultimate moves![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075303_MSG0006
rows.name: ...Hm? You ask where that Master is?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075303_MSG0007
rows.name:
Well, you see...
I finally found Master here, but...
He ran away towards the north.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075303_MSG0008
rows.name:
You noticed a good point.
I am the number one apprentice of the strongest warrior, Gi Zang![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075303_MSG0009
rows.name:
...Or at least, I plan to be.
He won't easily take me as an apprentice, though.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075303_MSG0010
rows.name:
So, I crossed mountains and oceans searching for Master,
and finally found him here, but...
He ran away towards the north.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075303_MSG0011
rows.name:
Ugh... What should I do?
There are probably beasts even stronger than the ones just now over there...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075303_MSG0012
rows.name:
From what I've heard, there's even a monster
called Hastara Grage around, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075303_MSG0013
rows.name:
If you encounter something like that,
even a ferocious Belgazas wouldn't make it back alive.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075303_JNK0030
rows.name: Warn

rows.label: qev075303_SEL0031
rows.name: Warn him that he should return to NLA.

rows.label: qev075303_JNK0040
rows.name: Provoke

rows.label: qev075303_SEL0041
rows.name: Taunt him, asking if that's all his resolve to become an apprentice amounts to.

rows.label: qev075303_MSG0014
rows.name:
You are a kind Earthling.
But I absolutely want to become strong.
I have to change![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075303_MSG0015
rows.name:
If I get scared like a Blatta and turn back in a place like this...
I'll be no different from when I was in the village![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075303_MSG0016
rows.name:
Damn, you're an irritating Earthling...
Hmph... I won't give up![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075303_MSG0017
rows.name:
If I get scared like a Blatta and turn back in a place like this...
I'll be no different from when I was in the village![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075303_MSG0018
rows.name:
I have to change!
I will become a strong man who isn't ashamed as a Bias![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075303_MSG0019
rows.name:
Alright! Here I go!!
I will absolutely become Zang-shishou's apprentice
and become the strongest Bias![ST:wait ]
